Product page template / club release

Metallique
Chardonnay Trio

A cleaner club-release PDP mockup built around stainless-steel energy, mineral language, and a three-bottle offer that feels bright instead of salesy.

Positioning block Chardonnay stripped down to citrus, salt, and steel. The page puts freshness, not oak shorthand, at the center of the offer.
Meyer lemon Green apple Crushed shell Cold finish

Club offer mockup

$126

Three bottles positioned as a clean-fridge, late-summer default rather than a generic quantity break.

Claim trio
  • Three bottles / club priority
  • Summer seafood pairing note
  • Inline add-on for oysters and glasses

Value framing

Lead with freshness

The top of the page sells clarity and mood before it ever drops into vineyard facts or technical winemaking detail.

Occasion module

Make the trio make sense

The bundle is framed as weekend utility: cold bottle now, cold bottle tomorrow, and one bottle left for whoever shows up late.

Add-on logic

Cross-sell as hospitality

Supplementary offers are structured around the same moment of use, so the merchandising feels host-minded instead of extractive.
